## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__AI INSTITUTE AFRICA__  
275 Herbert Chitepo Avenue   
Harare Zimbabwe   
15/04/25

# MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING \(MOU\)

## BETWEEN

__AI INSTITUTE AFRICA__  
275 herbert chitepo avenue  
Harare Zimbabwe

AND

__RUBIEM INTELLIGENCE__  
75 herbert chitepo avenue   
Harare Zimbabwe 

## 1\. PURPOSE

This Memorandum of Understanding \(MOU\) sets forth the terms and understanding between AI Institute Africa and Rubiem Intelligence \(hereinafter referred to collectively as the "Parties"\) for collaboration in the development and delivery of Artificial Intelligence \(AI\) training programs\.

The purpose of this partnership is to jointly promote AI education, skills development, and capacity building across individuals, organizations, and institutions\.

## 2\. OBJECTIVES

The objectives of this MOU include:

To design and deliver high\-quality AI training programs

To promote AI literacy and adoption across Africa

To co\-develop curriculum, workshops, and certification programs

To support innovation and research in artificial intelligence

## 3\. SCOPE OF COLLABORATION

The Parties agree to collaborate in the following areas:

### 3\.1 Training Programs

Joint development and delivery of AI training sessions, workshops, and bootcamps

Corporate and institutional AI training programs

### 3\.2 Curriculum Development

Co\-creation of AI training materials and resources

Development of structured learning pathways and certifications

### 3\.3 Events and Outreach

Co\-hosting seminars, webinars, and conferences

Community engagement and awareness initiatives

### 3\.4 Research and Innovation

Collaboration on AI\-related research projects

Sharing knowledge, tools, and best practices

## 4\. ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

### 4\.1 AI Institute Africa

Provide expertise in AI education and curriculum development

Facilitate training delivery and certification processes\.  

Support outreach and community engagement initiatives\.  

### 4\.2 Rubiem Intelligence

Provide technical expertise and AI implementation experience

Lead practical training sessions and real\-world applications

Support business development and client engagement

## 5\. FINANCIAL ARRANGEMENTS

Financial terms for specific projects or training programs will be agreed upon separately in writing\.

Revenue sharing, if applicable, will be determined on a case\-by\-case basis\.

## 6\. CONFIDENTIALITY

Both Parties agree to maintain confidentiality of any proprietary or sensitive information shared during the course of this collaboration\.

## 7\. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

Any jointly developed materials shall be co\-owned unless otherwise agreed\.

Pre\-existing intellectual property remains the sole property of the originating Party\.

## 8\. TERM AND TERMINATION

This MOU shall become effective on the date of signing and remain valid for a period of __\[10 years\]__\.

Either Party may terminate this MOU with __30 days written notice__\.

## 9\. NON\-BINDING AGREEMENT

This MOU is not intended to create legally binding obligations but serves as a framework for collaboration between the Parties\.

## 10\. GOVERNING LAW

This MOU shall be governed by the laws of __Zimbabwe__\.

## 11\. SIGNATORIES

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Memorandum of Understanding\.

__For AI Institute Africa__
